functions.name: mtmtrain.utils.clean_ascii
documentation:
Remove Non ASCII characters from the dataset.

Arguments:
    text: str

functions.name: mtmtrain.env.init_env
documentation: 根据环境进行必要的初始化

functions.name: mtmtrain.text_classify.art_rewrite.art_rewrite
documentation: 给定文章，改写文章，输出的结果将是最终文章。

functions.name: mtmtrain.text_classify.demo1.train_best_model.train_best
documentation:
训练模型
\:param config: 超参数
\:param model: 模型
\:param dataloaders: 处理后的数据，包含trian,dev,test
\:param log_step: 每隔多少个batch打印一次数据，默认100
\:return: 训练的指标

functions.name: mtmtrain.text_classify.demo1.train_best_model.dev_eval
documentation:
得到开发集和测试集的准确率和loss
\:param model: 模型
\:param data: 测试集集和开发集的数据
\:param loss_function: 损失函数
\:return: 损失和准确率

functions.name: mtmtrain.text_classify.demo1.data_process_module.load_dataset
documentation:
将路径文本文件分词并转为三元组返回
\:param path: 文件路径
\:param pad_size: 每个序列的大小
\:param tokenizer: 转为词级别或字级别
\:param vocab: 词向量模型
\:return: 二元组，含有字ID，标签

classes.name: mtmtrain.train_demos.run_classification.DataTrainingArguments
documentation:
Arguments pertaining to what data we are going to input our model for training and eval.

Using `HfArgumentParser` we can turn this class
into argparse arguments to be able to specify them on
the command line.

classes.name: mtmtrain.train_demos.run_classification.ModelArguments
documentation: Arguments pertaining to which model/config/tokenizer we are going to fine-tune from.
